sections.title: Dialogue without a Ghostspeak amulet equipped
Dialogue with a Ghostspeak amulet equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I fought a really big ghost dog in here - is he gone now?

lines.speaker: Ghost
lines.text: Yes, he is gone from this place. You did a great thing removing him.

lines.speaker: Ghost
lines.text: You were well rewarded for you effort. But you should leave this place, for it is not wise to tarry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I lost my shadow sword and I don't know how to get it back.

lines.speaker: Ghost
lines.text: Ah, so that is why you return. I can assist you in that and give you another.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you anyway...or were you...?

lines.speaker: Ghost
lines.text: Who I was does not matter. Now, I am a guardian for the Shadow Realm and I am protecting this area from any more disturbances.

lines.speaker: Ghost
lines.text: There are those who walk in the Shadow Realm who should not.
